transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I need a refill for my blood pressure medication. My previous prescription was from Dr. Iyer here.
AGENT: I can help with that. May I have your name and patient ID or date of birth for verification?
CALLER: Balakrishnan Nair. Date of birth 12 March 1962.
AGENT: Thank you. I can see your records. Your last prescription for Amlodipine 5mg was dated about 8 weeks ago from Dr. Ramesh Iyer. Shall I send a refill request to Dr. Iyer for approval?
CALLER: Yes please. Can it be sent to the pharmacy directly?
AGENT: Once Dr. Iyer approves, we can send an e-prescription to our in-house pharmacy or email it to you. Which do you prefer?
CALLER: Email would be better. It's balaknair62@gmail.com.
AGENT: Noted. The refill request will be submitted to Dr. Iyer. Once he approves, the e-prescription will be emailed to you within 24 hours. Is there anything else?
CALLER: That's all. Thank you very much.
